stemHtml: What shape and colour does the Landing Direction Indicator typically have?

options.a: T-shaped, white or orange, outlined by white lights when used at night.
options.b: T-shaped, white or red, outlined by green lights at night.
options.c: T-shaped, red or orange, outlined by white lights at night.
options.d: T-shaped, white or yellow, outlined by white lights at night.
